campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most people chase yield farming rewards. The real play is capturing the value that flows TO those rewards.

MarbMarket is flipping the script as the first veDEX on MegaETH. Not another DEX clone — a governance powerhouse where your MARB locks control the emissions.

Here's how it works: projects pay bribes for LP votes, which flow back to you as MARB lockers. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards. The flywheel doesn't just reward liquidity — it rewards governance power.

Fair launch. No presale. No VCs. Just community-driven incentives that compound over time.

This isn't just another DEX. It's the beginning of a new governance paradigm on MegaETH.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain What's the most innovative governance mechanism you've seen in DeFi?
qa_comments: This is a brilliant take on how governance can actually capture real value instead of just chasing rewards. The flywheel model sounds incredibly well-designed!
Love how you're flipping the script by rewarding governance power rather than just liquidity. The longer locks = more incentives creates a sustainable model.
Fair launch with no VC backing is exactly what DeFi needs. This could really set a new standard for governance in the space.
